data.title: Gold heads for biggest weekly loss in 6 months as Trump’s Gulf tour rattles markets
data.description:
Gold prices fell hard on Friday, dropping more than 1% by mid-morning, and closing in on their worst weekly decline since November 2024, according to data from Reuters. Investors began pulling out after a temporary US-China tariff truce combined with a stronger dollar to hammer demand for the metal. As of press time, spot gold […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gold-biggest-weekly-loss-in-6-months-trump/

data.title: Why Did a TikTok-Linked Company Buy $300M in $TRUMP
data.description:

That’s not all—this company has links with the same people behind TikTok. So, what’s going on here? Why is the GD culture group deciding to buy $TRUMP? Let’s break it down together

data.title: Top crypto to buy as Saudi Central Bank reveals exposure to MSTR
data.description:
Bitcoin and other crypto assets have been in an uptrend in recent sessions after the Saudi Central Bank (SAMA) confirmed significant exposure to MicroStrategy Inc. According to SAMA’s latest 13F filing, it owns a total of 25,656 shares of the business intelligence firm that has successfully transformed into a Bitcoin-proxy over the past few years.
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/top-crypto-to-buy-as-saudi-central-bank-reveals-exposure-to-mstr/

data.title: Wormhole Foundation Appoints Arian Motamenzadeh as Managing Director
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wormhole Foundation announced that Arian Motamenzadeh officially served as the new managing director of the foundation, focusing on protocol fee conversion and related protocol revenue, as well as promoting the adoption of Wormhole on the institutional side. Arian Motamenzadeh has more than ten years of experience in startup leadership, market entry strategy, and scaling profitability. He has built companies from scratch to more than $350 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) at world-class companies such as DoorDash and EasyPark, and led these companies to billions of dollars in IPOs and exits.

data.title: Bitcoin's Illiquid Supply Surpasses 14 Million, Indicating Long-Term Holding Trend
data.description: According to TechFlow, data from CryptoRank and Glassnode reveals that as of May 14, 2025, Bitcoin's illiquid supply, which refers to Bitcoin held long-term with minimal circulation, has exceeded 14 million coins. This accounts for nearly two-thirds of the total mined supply. The data further indicates that in the past 30 days alone, 180,000 Bitcoins have been transferred into dormant wallets with little spending history, reinforcing the market's long-term holding trend. Charts demonstrate a clear positive correlation between illiquid supply and Bitcoin prices since 2019.

data.title: USDD launches the second phase of TRX and sTRX Vaults stability fee reduction activities, limited-time discounts + lucky draws to jointly build a global ecological map
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On May 15, USDD officially announced the official launch of the second phase of the TRX and sTRX Vaults 30-day limited-time stability fee promotion (Singapore time May 15 16:00 to June 15 16:00), further accelerating its DeFi ecosystem expansion. In this event, users can enjoy ultra-low stability rates of 0.5% for TRX Vault and 1% for sTRX Vault, and participate in staking on multiple platforms through USDD, enjoy rich returns, and fully release the growth potential of DeFi.

In order to further stimulate community vitality, the official simultaneously launched the "USDD Community Welfare Event". From now until June 15, users can share 500 USDD rewards by completing @gleamapp tasks and accumulating 7 social media check-ins (excluding US and EU users).

data.title: Wormhole Foundation Appoints New Managing Director
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Wormhole Foundation has announced the appointment of Arian Motamenzadeh as its new Managing Director. Motamenzadeh will focus on protocol fee conversion, related protocol revenue, and promoting Wormhole's adoption among institutional clients.

With over a decade of experience in startup leadership, market entry strategies, and scaling profitability, Motamenzadeh has played a pivotal role in building companies like DoorDash and EasyPark from the ground up. His efforts have led these companies to achieve annual recurring revenue exceeding $350 million and facilitated multi-billion dollar IPOs and exits.

data.title: Ethereum Transaction Fees Surge by 160% Due to Increased On-Chain Activity
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum has experienced a significant increase in transaction fees, rising by 160% this week. This surge is attributed to a substantial growth in on-chain activity. The heightened demand for transactions on the Ethereum network has led to increased costs, reflecting the network's current usage trends.
